content:
At NanoSoft, we know that every detail counts when building a website for your small business. Here’s a quick tip: Optimize your site's images by compressing them without losing quality. This not only speeds up load times but also improves the user experience on mobile devices—a crucial factor given the increasing number of customers browsing from their phones.

Why it matters: In today's fast-paced market, customers expect websites to be responsive and quick. A faster loading page can significantly boost your SEO rankings and keep visitors engaged.

How’s your website performing? Have you optimized your images yet?
